Oakwood Escrow strives provide our clients with exceptional service. you should have any complaints concerns related your experience with Oakwood, please let know completing the following here.
Oakwood Escrow holds close and personal knowledge that the service provide crucial component the overall successful closing transaction and direct reflection any referring source. Oakwood Escrow constantly strives build better systems and welcomes the opportunity for comment from consumer willing help so.
The Oakwood Escrow complaint management system was designed responsive consumer complaints. The purpose this policy ensure that every Oakwood team member understands the importance and procedures for receiving, responding, recording and reporting consumer's complaint for the ultimate purpose resolving the issue the best our ability.
This policy covers the ways consumer can submit complaint Oakwood, the escalation complaint through the appropriate levels Oakwood and ultimately the recording and reporting requirements once the complaint received.
4.1.1 The Complaint Resolutions Manager responsible for being the company's one directing source for any consumer complaint.
4.1.2 The Complaint Resolutions Manager responsible for evaluating and distinguishing among inquiries, feedback, and complaints.
4.1.2.1 Categorizing complaints received critical for meaningful root cause analyses and management reporting. Oakwood's complaints management program was designed collect all types complaint data, even situations when the complaint does not specifically relate escrow service.
4.1.3 The Complaint Resolutions Manager responsible for directing the consumer through Oakwood's complaint process and facilitating the consumer resolution.
4.1.4 The Complaint Resolution Manager responsible notify our regulatory body, the Department Business Oversight, and loan involved then the corresponding Financial Institution, the complaint involves breach the Oakwood Escrow Inc. Security Agreement involves complaints determined misconduct, unfair deceptive practices, potential noncompliance with legal and regulatory requirements.
4.2 Tracking and Reporting Complaint Data.
4.2.1 Oakwood Escrow Inc. maintains documentation all consumer complaints received and will retain all data collected regarding those complaints for the period years.
4.3 asking speak with manager notifying any Oakwood Escrow Inc. employee that they have complaint.
4.3.1 All Oakwood Escrow employees are instructed contact manager soon consumer requests them so. manager not immediately available then the Oakwood consumer complaint form should completed the person accepting the complaint and emailed Oakwood Escrow's Complaint Resolutions Manger.
4.3.2 After accepting and addressing complaint the manager complete and send the Oakwood Consumer Complaint form the Complaints Resolutions Manager for further processing and recording.
4.3.3 The Complaint Resolution Manager will follow with the manager and the consumer ensure the matter has been properly resolved along with reporting the matter appropriate the Financial Institution and the Department Business Oversight.
4.3.4 response the consumer from the Compliance Resolutions Manager will sent within working hours.
4.4 visiting our 'Consumer Service Inquiries and Complaints' form here.
4.4.1 After online submittal the consumer will receive receipt confirmation back via email upon receipt Oakwood the consumers complaint.
4.5 Social Media. Oakwood Escrow Inc. consistently monitors the web for any and all comments related Oakwood Escrow.
4.5.1 complaint noticed then the team member noticing should complete the consumer complaint form and immediately send the Complaint Resolutions Manager.
4.6 DEPARTMENT BUSINESS OVERSIGHT (DEPARTMENT) consumer may submit complaint for resolution direct the The Department Business Oversight.
4.6.1 The Complaint Resolutions Manager will monitor all communication from the DBO and immediately address any complaints received.
